title: 菊花賞の後に・懸河奔りて

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Hyaaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: Super Creek's in front! Super Creek is in the lead!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: I won! I did it!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Thank you so much for your support, everybody!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: To think she was this capable...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(Although, truth be told, I'm more... thankful than
irked.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(Since there are still others out there—besides
Yaeno and Chiyono O—whom I wish to defeat!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(And if I'm in the heat of a race against all those
opponents, I expect a new door will open before
me...)

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: ...It appears I have another opponent to best.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
What a coincidence. I was just thinking the same
thing myself.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Heh.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Next time, I will be the one to take down Creek.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Let's settle this during our next contest... I'm
eagerly awaiting the opportunity.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...Although my results today were wanting, I did
make great strides on a personal level.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I've learned that, right now, there are many
potential rivals out there—many racers whom I
wish to surpass.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Furthermore, I learned that my races against them
are sure to be wonderful occasions on which I can
run with every ounce of my being.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: I felt that today, with this very body.
choice_data_list: How did that sensation make you feel?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...Absolutely overjoyed.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Because as long as I have my cherished rivals, the
limits available for me to surpass will remain
infinite.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
And that means that the light I emit—and the
dazzling trail I leave in my wake—will shine on
into eternity!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After a fierce race against strong contenders she's
never faced before, it looks like Mejiro Ardan is
sensing signs of growth.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As her classic year draws to a close, I bet the
upcoming clashes against her rivals will become
even more intense.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It'd probably be best to give ourselves some time
to build up Mejiro Ardan's skills before running
another goal race.
choice_data_list: Next, let's set our sights on the Osaka Hai.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Ah, the traditional route? That race determines
the finest medium-distance runner of the spring,
doesn't it?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...I imagine it'll be another gathering of brilliant
lights.
choice_data_list: You must be quite excited for that moment.
You must be quite excited for that moment.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I am, but... Oh, is it odd? For my heart to be
racing so.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm confident that her sheer enthusiasm will turn
her running into something even more dazzling to
behold.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
If you think so, Trainer, then I shall gladly
surrender myself to this jubilant feeling.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Now, let's go back right away and review today's
events. I wish to look over Creek's performance.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, an ecstatic Mejiro Ardan and I make our
way back to the academy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Meanwhile, unbeknownst to us...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Currently in first place is Super Creek! Super
Creek is in the lead!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Wow...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Creek, Yaeno, and Ardan... They're all getting
stronger and stronger...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: While I'm just...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: (...It's okay. I can get stronger.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: (No. I have to get stronger...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(...In order to become a worthy rival to Chiyono
O when she returns to the races someday!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
The Osaka Hai—there, I shall put on an even
more radiant performance!
